title: Crimes Committed On-Foot
query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS crimes FROM CommitCrime WHERE event_timestamp >= :startDate AND event_timestamp < :endDate
detailQuery: SELECT CrimeType AS label, COUNT(*) AS value FROM CommitCrime WHERE event_timestamp >= :startDate AND event_timestamp < :endDate GROUP BY CrimeType ORDER BY value DESC

details.text: {crimes} on-foot crime(s) logged during the report period. The crime type breakdown is a confessional — murder, theft, and trespass each paint a different picture of what kind of operative you are in the settlements.
details.help: CommitCrime captures all criminal acts. Bar chart groups by CrimeType to show the distribution of offences.

tagLines: Criminal activity log updated. The relevant security services have been notified. Assume they are already en route.
Some commanders fight for glory. Some fight for credits. This chart suggests a third motivation.
The galaxy has laws. You have opinions about them. This is where those opinions are documented.
